d: zSMTH is an ad-free, open source Mizuki community Android client. iSO platform has the same source project SMTH-iOS. This client has the following features: * Post graphics mixed display, support GIF animation, long press the post to pop up the function menu; * Support the display of super-long pictures; full-screen view and zoom of picture attachments; view picture Exif information and save pictures to local; * Show Like of posts, add new Like; * Show IP source; * Reminder of letters, replies, @, Like events; * Quick search of all forum listings (support Chinese and English partial matching); * Share posts to SNS networks, including WeChat friends, WeChat circle of friends, Sina Weibo, etc. and more.
